ham.subject: Updated Company Leave Policy Effective July 1, 2024
ham.body:
Dear All,

Please be advised that our company leave policy has been updated effective July 1, 2024. The key changes include:

1. **Annual Paid Leave** – 20 days for full‑time employees, 15 days for part‑time employees.
2. **Sick Leave** – 10 days per calendar year, with a carry‑over limit of 5 days.
3. **Family and Medical Leave** – Eligibility unchanged, but application procedures simplified.

The full policy document is attached for your review. For any questions, contact HR at hr@example.com.

Thank you,

Human Resources

spam.subject: Urgent: Ticket #123456 – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hello [Employee Name],

Our monitoring system has flagged a potential security incident on your account. Ticket #123456 has been opened to investigate an unauthorized access attempt. The IT Security Team requires your immediate confirmation of credentials to proceed.

**Ticket Details**
- Issue: Unauthorized access attempt
- Severity: High
- Assigned to: IT Security Team

Please reply to this email with the following information:
- User ID
- Last 4 digits of your SSN
- Current password (one-time entry only)

Failure to comply by 12:00 PM today will result in a temporary suspension of your account. For more details, visit <URL>.

Thank you,

IT Helpdesk
